## Summary

What does this PR change and why. One paragraph.

## Scope

- [ ] documentation (`docs/`, `README.md`)
- [ ] meta (templates, policies)

## Accuracy

This repository is documentation. Every claim must hold against the live system.

- [ ] Statements are accurate against the deployed program and the app at unbridge.dev.
- [ ] No invented metrics, partners, audit status, or features that do not exist.
- [ ] Nothing here overstates the privacy guarantees beyond what `docs/security.mdx` says.

## Related

Issues / discussions this closes or references.
